info.title: Themiify
info.author: Fangal
info.description: Wii U Theme Installer and Manager
info.details: Themiify is a homebrew application that allows for on the fly installation of Wii U Menu themes via the Themezer API or via .utheme files placed on an SD Card. Once a theme is installed StyleMiiU will read the theme and show it the next time the Wii U Menu is loaded.

changelog:
v1.1
What's Changed

Many small UI improvements & better error handling

Contributions:

- Fix broken .gitmodules and wiiu-stdout by @dkosmari in https://github.com/Themiify-hb/Themiify/pull/3
- Combined PR for 4 and 5 by @dkosmari in https://github.com/Themiify-hb/Themiify/pull/6
- Rewrite of the theme preview carousel. by @dkosmari in https://github.com/Themiify-hb/Themiify/pull/4
- Better error handling, and a bunch of other small changes. by @dkosmari in https://github.com/Themiify-hb/Themiify/pull/5
